meaning: n.暴发户,一心想发迹的人
examples: The coats of my growing-up seemed too all-encompassing, too obliterating of the person underneath. That, or just too nakedly arriviste.
In his memoirs, Tony Blair guesses that he unsettled the Establishment by being an "arriviste" : neither born into the elite nor knowing his proper place.
Most of it supports Mr Fox, but some members still resent him as a rude, loud-mouthed and ideologically dubious arriviste.
